queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Statistical impact of present employment duration less than one year on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with the absence of a checking account in consumer lending.

queries.feature_definition: Loan purpose: purchase of radio or TV.
queries.question: Empirical evidence on loan purposes for consumer durables such as radio or TV as mitigating factors in credit risk assessment.
